message:
feat(tui): enhance history list with commit type icons and status markers

History bead list: add status icon + type icon per entry, use ▸ marker
History git list: add commit type icon (F/B/D/R/T/C...) from message,
use compact duration labels for timestamps

Addresses bd-2bpl.3.6.10.1 (history timeline redesign).
